assertions.assertion: The migration runner project has .WithReference() for the database resource
assertions.rationale: Code shows `.WithReference(identityDb)` on the migration runner.

assertions.assertion: The migration runner project has .WaitFor() for the SQL Server or database resource
assertions.rationale: Code shows `.WaitFor(sqlServer)` on the migration runner.

assertions.assertion: The IdentityServer project uses .WaitFor() referencing the migration runner project, not directly waiting for SQL Server
The IdentityServer project still has .WithReference() for the database resource so it gets the connection string
